title: Add new crates for uncovered sklearn modules: covariance, neural_network
description:
Step 12 of 12 in sklearn parity audit (#240).

Scope (no existing ferrolearn crate): 
- sklearn.covariance: EmpiricalCovariance, ShrunkCovariance, LedoitWolf, OAS, MinCovDet, GraphicalLasso, GraphicalLassoCV, EllipticEnvelope, empirical_covariance, ledoit_wolf, oas, shrunk_covariance, log_likelihood, graphical_lasso → propose new ferrolearn-covariance crate.
- sklearn.neural_network: MLPClassifier, MLPRegressor, BernoulliRBM → propose new ferrolearn-neural crate (or fold into ferrotorch?).

Decision needed: scope these as new ferrolearn workspace crates, or defer NN to ferrotorch. covariance is a clear new crate.

Related existing issues: #188 (BernoulliRBM)
